# OpenAI Codex Changelog

## Version 0.118.0 (March 31, 2026)

**New Features:**
- Windows sandbox now enforces proxy-only networking with OS-level egress rules
- App-server clients support device code flow for ChatGPT sign-in
- `codex exec` enables prompt-plus-stdin workflow with piped input
- Custom model providers can fetch and refresh short-lived bearer tokens dynamically

**Bug Fixes:**
- Project-local `.codex` files protected on first creation
- Linux sandbox launches more reliable with trusted system `bwrap`
- App-server TUI regained missing workflows: hook notifications, `/copy`, `/resume`
- MCP startup more robust with longer startup window
- Windows `apply_patch` less likely to fail with redundant writable roots

## Version 0.117.0 (March 26, 2026)

**New Features:**
- Plugins are now a first-class workflow with startup sync and TUI browsing
- Sub-agents use path-based addresses like `/root/agent_a`
- `/title` terminal-title picker works in classic and app-server TUI
- App-server clients support shell commands, filesystem watches, remote websocket connections
- `view_image` returns image URLs for code mode
- Prompt history recall works in app-server TUI across sessions

**Bug Fixes:**
- `tui_app_server` no longer duplicates reasoning summaries or `/review` output
- ChatGPT login opens local browser, cancels on Ctrl+C
- Terminal state restored reliably on early exits
- Linux sandboxed tools more reliable on older distributions
- Remote multi-agent sessions show agent names instead of IDs

**Chores:**
- App-server-backed TUI now enabled by default
- Legacy artifact tool removed; deprecated `read_file` and `grep_files`

Updated: 2026-04-05
